metadata.title: Team
metadata.description: Driving innovation from CESGA. Our mission is to accelerate the digital transformation of the biotechnology, agrifood, forestry-sea-industrial and health sectors.

header.title: Driving innovation
header.missionText1: OneHealth DataSpace is driven by a multidisciplinary team from the Galicia Supercomputing Center (CESGA) specialized in data spaces, artificial intelligence, data science, high-performance computing, interoperability, and digital governance.
header.missionText2: At CESGA, we work to enable secure data sharing between organizations, fostering research, innovation, and the development of data- and AI-driven solutions under the One Health approach. Our commitment is to build a sustainable infrastructure aligned with the European data strategy and prepared to evolve alongside the future 1HealthAI Factory.
